name: Pinto Beans
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup cilantro stems and leaves (separate from herbs)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients except tomatoes, cilantro stems and leaves, and onion in a heavy pot.
2. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 1 1/2 to 2 hours, stirring occasionally.
3. Check the tenderness of the beans.
4. Add the diced tomatoes, cilantro stems and leaves, and onion.
5. Simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
6. Serve 24 portions.
